name: @sparkjsdev/spark
description: An advanced 3D Gaussian Splatting renderer for THREE.js

scripts.build: pnpm run build:production && pnpm run build:dev
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist/ && rm -rf node_modules/ && rm -rf rust/target/ && rm -rf rust/spark-rs/pkg/ && pnpm run assets:clean
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:dev && (vite --host & pnpm run build:watch)
scripts.docs: node scripts/clean-site-files.js && node scripts/copy-site-files.js && mkdocs serve
scripts.memory:search: sh -c 'query="${npm_config_query:-$*}"; query=${query#-- }; test -n "$query" && ~/ai-tools/mempalace/bin/mempalace search "$query" --wing spark || { echo "Usage: pnpm run memory:search -- \"A-Frame Babylon backend adapters\""; exit 1; }' --
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build
scripts.site:build:relativeurls: pnpm run build && pnpm run site:clean && node scripts/copy-site-files.js && mkdocs build && node scripts/rename-assets-to-static.js && node scripts/replace-urls.js
scripts.site:build: pnpm run build && pnpm run site:clean && node scripts/copy-site-files.js && mkdocs build && node scripts/rename-assets-to-static.js
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:dev && pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.test:perf: pnpm run build:dev && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.perf.config.ts
scripts.test:perf:smoke: SPARK_PERF_SCENES=axes SPARK_PERF_BACKENDS=three,aframe,babylon-texture,babylon-native SPARK_PERF_FRAMES=3 SPARK_PERF_WARMUP_FRAMES=1 pnpm run test:perf
